narrative: UK political crisis deepens, driving GBP/USD to five-week lows at 1.3335 as the pound lags the G8 (-0.94% avg); USD leads the complex (+1.08% avg) on Fed hike bets and a 175bp carry advantage over EUR. Gold falls below $4,600 as USD buying persists, while WTI surges +3.54% on UAE pipeline acceleration news; gold lower -2.82%; equities +0.77%; DXY +0.46%; VIX 18.6. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27 for NZD directional risk.
